_doc: Declarative registry of daily OBLIGATIONS the rig owes itself. Each obligation names a state-file whose CONTENT freshness (mtime + an internal timestamp/field) proves the obligation was met today. gamma-companion/lib/obligations.js reconciles each against this contract and surfaces RED ones as cards. This file is DATA only -- it does not run anything; it tells the checker what 'ran' looks like. Read by the companion; safe to hand-edit. NOTE: fresh_within values are minutes. expect_evidence paths are relative to repo root.
_authored: 2026-06-21 overnight (autonomous, SAFE) -- additive; no production doctrine touched

obligations.label: Premarket prep ran (bias + levels)
obligations.detail_hint: Gamma_Premarket should refresh today-bias.json each trading morning. A stale date means premarket did not run -- the engine would trade on yesterday's bias and levels.

obligations.label: EOD pipeline produced today's daily review
obligations.detail_hint: Gamma_DailyReview / Gamma_EodSummary write analysis/daily-brief/{date}.md. Missing today's file means the EOD pipeline (summary, analyst, manager) did not close the loop -- no journaled grade, no drift check.

obligations.label: Heartbeat alive (engine-health GREEN)
obligations.detail_hint: engine-health.json is the heartbeat's own health beacon. A stale checked_at_utc (>30m) means the health beacon itself stopped updating; a RED critical sub-check (heartbeat_safe/heartbeat_bold) means a heartbeat loop is dead.

obligations.label: Scheduled tasks healthy (no silent tasks)
obligations.detail_hint: scheduled-tasks-audit.json reports SILENT_TASK flags when a Gamma_* task has not run within its expected window. health=RED or flags_count>0 means one or more scheduled jobs silently stopped firing.

obligations.label: Chart-reading gym GREEN
obligations.detail_hint: Gamma_GymSession writes gym-scorecard-{date}.json (verdict GREEN/YELLOW/RED) at 17:00 ET. Missing today's scorecard or a RED verdict means the daily chart-reading physical exam did not pass -- detectors may be mis-firing.

obligations.label: Watcher feed fresh
obligations.detail_hint: The watcher_feed sub-check inside engine-health.json proves the watcher layer is seeing fresh bars. RED there (or a stale engine-health beacon) means the watcher fleet is reading a dead/cached feed -- the fail-green trap the obligation registry exists to catch.
